## Interpretation

This is a deterministic regression corpus for ToxicJoin's declared SQL and policy profile. It is not a claim of universal privacy detection and does not replace evaluation against an organization's own schemas, classifications, policies, and workloads.

The committed file is a human-readable rendering of the CI-generated report. The full JSON report is reproducible with:

```bash
toxicjoin-benchmark --output-dir artifacts/benchmark
```

The command exits non-zero if any decision, effective outcome, expected reason, safe-rewrite expectation, false-allow gate, or unsafe-effective-allow gate regresses.
